High-confidence cross-pipeline weaknesses found:

Notebook executability proof is missing for reviewed pipeline notebooks (template/unexecuted state).
Evaluate entrypoints are effectively stubs across pipeline folders.
Some integration docs claim broader page usage than what is clearly active in current routing and services.
Validation depth is uneven; at least one regression result is unrealistically perfect, suggesting leakage/target proxy risk.
If you want, I can produce a strict “video-safe subset” list (green/yellow/red) with exact demo script order in one page.
